pr.title: Non-record: Autoresearch Heads4 + Step-based LR + Sliding Window (1xH100)

output.summary: Automated autoresearch loop reruns the SOTA stack (10L, BigramHash, SmearGate) to find NUM_HEADS=4 head_dim=128, step-based LR, sliding-window eval tweaks.
techniques: Autoresearch loop tuning architecture and optimizer settings
Step-based warmdown schedule replacing wallclock-based LR decay
Sliding-window eval with expanded BigramHash and SmearGate stack
